label: Performance & operations
description: Operational guidance for performance, logs, and monitoring.
value:
## Performance & Operations

- Identify and fix N+1 queries in database access.
- Use explicit caching and invalidate it carefully.
- Log with structured context (request IDs, correlation IDs) not string concatenation.
- Instrument critical paths with metrics and health checks.
- Exclude generated assets from indexing and avoid bloated search contexts.
